name: generate_switch_network_for_noc
short_description: Generate switch network and simulation wrapper for NoC
full_help:
generate_switch_network_for_noc

Description: 
Generate switch network and simulation wrapper for NoC

Syntax: 
generate_switch_network_for_noc  [-mode <arg>] [-type <arg>] [-quiet]
                                 [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-mode]     Simulation mode. Values: behavioral, post-synthesis, 
              post-implementation
              Default: behavioral
  [-type]     Netlist type. Values: functional, timing. This is only 
              applicable when mode is set to post-synthesis or post-impleme  
                ntation
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
ToolLaunch, Simulation
